meaning: adj.抵抗的,有抵抗力的,有耐力的
examples: It's always opposing the velocity, so this is the magnitude of the resistive force.
A resistive screen also gradually wears out and requires more frequent calibration.
Definitely more expensive than resistive screens, by between 10% and 50%, depending on who you talk to.
Capacitive glass probably wouldn't help, and it's typically much more expensive than its resistive counterparts.
That could break Synaptics into the market for so-called resistive screens, like the face of a handheld computer.
